market_pulse: Saturday surge active: Zouk/OMNIA/Hakkasan showing strong lineup momentum; LIV/Encore leading with high-profile talent (David Guetta legacy shows, Alesso, Marshmello). Weekend readiness peak approaching.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Tiësto across Tao Beach and OMNIA
High engagement on dance music content
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Maximize Saturday presence. Counter-program non-EDM content (tech house, R&B, alternative). Partner with @globeth0tter tier creators who are active. Leverage pool day momentum.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, Hakkasan, and Zouk actively promoting live DJ sets; LIV not promoting real-time streaming or countdown content as prominently.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch 15-30 second countdown reels on TikTok/IG showing live DJ cam feeds 30 mins before peak hours. Tag creator handles (@rlgrime, @lavernmusic, @alesso) for cross-promotion.

content_gaps.description: Competitors using current EDM/house remixes of pop hits (Calvin Harris, Zedd); LIV using slower ambient/pool day audio.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Source trending dance music audio (Alesso, David Guetta remixes) and re-edit past LIV Beach footage to match trending sounds. Post 2-3 shorts daily.

content_gaps.description: Competitors pushing branded hashtags (#omnialasvegas, #zouklv) with 800K+ TikTok searches; LIV using #livlasvegas but less coordinated UGC campaigns.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch '#LIVSaturday' UGC challenge with a $500 prize for best TikTok/IG Reels this weekend. Repost top 5 from UGC accounts.

influencer_activity.mention: XS/Encore promoter with 180K followers pushing VIP table experiences. High authority for bottle service conversions.
Creator mentioned in Tao/Encore/OMNIA content; appears to be a high-engagement fashion/party lifestyle creator. 800K+ implied reach based on mentions.
Official artist account; LIV Beach feature documented across Tiktok and Instagram. Recent performance drives 50K+ impressions per post.

liv_outreach_targets.suggested_action: Offer complimentary daybed at LIV Beach + bottle service for content day (UGC rights)

liv_outreach_targets.reason: VIP promoter with 180K followers; controls table reservations at XS/Encore
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_action: Partner on cross-venue promotions; offer LIV promoter code for XS/Encore attendees
